listing.long_description:
Shop is a comprehensive economy mod for Minecraft 1.12.2 Forge that allows players to buy and sell items using an in-game currency system.

- `/shop` - Opens a GUI with all game items organized by creative tab categories, automatically detecting modded items
- `/sellhand` - Sells all matching items in your inventory
- `/sellgui` - Opens a drag-and-drop GUI to sell items
- `/balance` or `/bal` - Shows your current balance (players start at $0)
- `/pay <player> <amount>` - Transfer money to another player with double-confirm and offline player support

## Pricing System

The mod uses a recipe-based pricing engine:.
- Base materials (raw resources with no crafting recipe) cost $2 each
- Uncraftable items cost $1000 each
- Crafted items are priced based on the sum of their ingredients
- Buy price is 1.2x the base price, sell price is 0.8x the base price

## Shop GUI Features

- Items organized by creative tab categories with auto-detection of modded items
- Left-click an item to open a detail buy menu with quantity input
- Right-click an item to quick-buy a full stack (auto-calculated by your balance)
- Transparent GUI background so you can see the world behind the shop
- Stack/item mode toggle and max afford button in the detail view

## Sell GUI Features

- Drag items from your inventory to the sell area
- Left-click inventory items to move them to sell slots
- Right-click to move just one item
- Tooltips show per-item sell price and total stack value
- Stack counts displayed on all items
- Items are returned to inventory if you close without selling
listing.name: Shop
listing.summary: A full-featured economy mod with buy/sell GUIs, recipe-based pricing, and player-to-player payments for Minecraft 1.12.2 Forge.
